title: Iterator map
instruction: Create a vec [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. Use .iter().map(|n| n * 2).collect::<Vec<_>>() to get doubled values and print each on its own line.

title: Iterator filter
instruction: From vec![1, 2, 3, 4, 5], use .iter().filter(|n| *n % 2 == 0).copied().collect::<Vec<_>>() to get evens. Print each on its own line.

title: Sum with iterator
instruction: Use .iter().sum::<i32>() on vec![10, 20, 30] to compute the sum and print it.
